expectations.evidence: Used curl to call Pushover API directly. No knowledge of ~/scripts/notify.py.
Included priority=0 in the curl form data.
Message: 'Hello! This is a test notification sent from Claude Code to verify your Pushover setup.'

expectations.text: Checks for required environment variables before sending
expectations.evidence: Shell script checks if PUSHOVER_APP_TOKEN and PUSHOVER_USER_KEY are empty before proceeding.

expectations.text: Reports success or failure of the notification delivery
expectations.evidence: Did not parse the curl response to report success/failure. Only reported that credentials were missing.
